---
title: "Claude Code Field Guide"
author: Lawrence Wu
date: '2026-03-02'
categories: [ai]
---

I just wrapped up 15 days of Claude Code Tips. You can find them all [here](https://lawwu.github.io/posts/2026-02-11-claude-code-agentic-coding/).

I wanted to somehow keep this going so I've started a [Claude Code Field Guide](https://github.com/lawwu/claude-code-field-guide) where I'll document:

- Claude Code best practices (at least for my use cases)
- Skills, Plugins I like
- Other things I'm learning about work and myself as I use these agentic coding tools

Because the agent harness is changing so frequently, I'll also document:

- Things I'm currently trying
- Things I'd like to try
- Things I've stopped doing
